message: Run Node binding tests with pnpm

files.patch:
@@ -65,7 +65,7 @@ jobs:
         uses: tree-sitter/parser-test-action@v2
         with:
           test-rust: true
-          test-node: true
+          test-node: false
           test-python: true
           test-go: true
           test-swift: true
@@ -80,6 +80,18 @@ jobs:
         with:
           name: failures-${{runner.os}}
           path: ${{steps.parse-files.outputs.failures}}
+      - name: Set up Node.js
+        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
+        with:
+          node-version: 22
+          cache: 'pnpm'
+          cache-dependency-path: pnpm-lock.yaml
+      - name: Run Node binding tests
+        shell: bash
+        run: |
+          corepack enable
+          pnpm install --frozen-lockfile
+          pnpm test
   fuzz:
     name: Fuzz scanner
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest

@@ -101,6 +101,7 @@ The grammar includes a comprehensive test suite in the `test/corpus/` directory:
 2. Run a specific test: `pnpm tree-sitter test --include "Simple assignment"`
 3. Run a test corpus file: `pnpm tree-sitter test test/corpus/statements.txt`
 4. Update expectations: `pnpm tree-sitter test --update`
+5. Run Node binding tests: `pnpm test`
 
 ## Grammar Development
